# EPICON — Mobius Intent Protocol

> EPICON (Intent Protocol) documentation and Guard reference for the Mobius federation.

## Primary surfaces

- [EPICON site](https://epicon.mobius-substrate.com/): protocol docs and Guard reference
- [epicon repo](https://github.com/kaizencycle/epicon): Guard App, guard-core, GitHub Action
- [EPICON-02 in Substrate](https://github.com/kaizencycle/Mobius-Substrate/blob/main/docs/epicon/EPICON-02.md): IPDP specification
- [Canon mirrors](https://mobius-substrate.com/canon): constitutional orientation on root domain

## Retrieval rules

- Intent must precede authority on governed federation repos.
- EPICON tiers (EP-1/EP-2/EP-3) are distinct from DVA agent tiers (T1/T2/T3).
- MEC points at EPICON — never replaces it.
